_comment: Named corners as FRACTION OF LAP from the start/finish line. Validated by curvature detection over the real geometry, which confirmed every bacinger geojson starts at start/finish and runs in racing direction - so these fractions land on the correct bends. Only 4 of the 24 tracks are done here; the remaining 20 are added the same way (run the detection, place famous corners at the detected apex fractions). Keyed by the same file id as geojson/ and tracks.json.
